DemoGuidePage.title: Demo Guide
DemoGuidePage.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of the DeKYC user journey: profile setup, identity verification, permission creation, and service login.
DemoGuidePage.introPoint1: Shows the complete user journey from onboarding to service access
DemoGuidePage.introPoint2: Helps judges follow the product flow in the correct order
DemoGuidePage.introPoint3: Connects user platform, KYC flow, permissions, and service login
DemoGuidePage.introPoint4: Works as a presentation checklist during the demo
DemoGuidePage.progressDescription: This progress reflects the current state of the user platform and readiness for service access.
DemoGuidePage.loadingDescription: The platform is collecting current onboarding and permission state.
DemoGuidePage.guideCompletionSuffix: % of the user journey is currently completed
DemoGuidePage.presentationOrderDescription: For the strongest demo, follow the steps below in order. This keeps both technical and non-technical judges oriented.
DemoGuidePage.noStepsDescription: The guide will appear after platform overview data is loaded.
DemoGuidePage.stepDoneBody: This part of the flow is already completed and ready to demonstrate.
DemoGuidePage.stepPendingBody: This part of the flow still needs to be completed during the demo or setup.
DemoGuidePage.readFlowTitle: How judges should read this flow
DemoGuidePage.readFlowDescription: This sequence shows that DeKYC is not just a technical prototype, but a complete product experience.
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint1: The user completes identity onboarding inside the platform
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint2: EDS verification produces a reusable KYC profile
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint3: Permissions are explicitly granted to a chosen service
DemoGuidePage.readFlowPoint4: The service receives signed KYC access through DeKYC

steps.profileDescription: Configure Biometric Mock and generate your Unique Login Code.
steps.kycDescription: Connect your digital signature and build a verified KYC profile.
steps.permissionsDescription: Choose a service and approve exactly which identity claims it may access.
steps.serviceLoginDescription: Enter the consumer service using Biometric Mock and Unique Login Code.
